Defendants Nancy Von Schwab'S And Cynthia Batanides' Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Nancy Von Schwab's and Cynthia Batanides' Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint -
Judge Miller is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this motion will be heard in Department 611 before Judge O'Malley Taylor on the same date and time. Parties are to appear. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Defendants Nancy Von Schwab'S And Cynthia Batanides' Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William G. McDevitt, Litchfield law Group, 415.526.6300, appearing for the Plaintiff.
Nicole P. Dogwill, Shartsis Friese LLP, 415.421.6500, appearing for the Defendants.

Matter called. Defendants Nancy Von Schwab and Cynthia Batanides' Motion to Strike the 1st Amended Complaint is ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument, the Court took the matter under submission. Visiting Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (LOT/611)

***After the court hearing the Court issued the following ruling: Defendants' motion to strike is granted in part. See order filed this date for full text. ***

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: DEFENDANTS NANCY VON SCHWAB'S and CYNTHIA BATANIDES' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Pursuant to the order of the Presiding Judge: The motion is continued to December 16, 2013. The motion will be heard in department 302 at 9:30 a.m. by a judge other than Judge Miller. Plaintiff shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J.
